childhood.familyBackground: German entrepreneur from an industrial family. His family was involved in manufacturing and engineering.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 산업 가족 출신의 독일 기업가. 그의 가족은 제조 및 엔지니어링에 참여했다.
childhood.earlyLife: Friedhelm Loh inherited and greatly expanded his family's electrical and automation equipment company. He is known for building Rittal into a global engineering company.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 가족의 전기 및 자동화 장비 회사를 상속받아 크게 확대했다. 리탈을 글로벌 엔지니어링 회사로 구축한 것으로 알려져 있다.

careerTimeline.event: Built Rittal into global engineering powerhouse
Diversified operations in automation and climate control
careerTimeline.eventKo: 자동화 및 냉각 제어에서 운영 다각화

personalTraits.knownFor: Founder and chairman of Rittal, global engineering and automation company
personalTraits.knownForKo: 리탈의 창립자이자 회장, 글로벌 엔지니어링 및 자동화 회사
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports education and engineering initiatives in Germany
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 독일의 교육 및 엔지니어링 이니셔티브 지원
